emails.subject: Last Quarter's Transactional Overview
emails.body_summary: Please review the attached summary of our transactions for the first quarter. Note any discrepancies or follow-up actions needed.

meetings.title: Insight Validation Discussion
meetings.transcript_summary: Discussed the potential discrepancies found in last quarter's transactional data, focusing on aligning them with current insights.
meetings.description: Validating the insights against the past data.

operational_insights.title: Quarterly Expenditure Spike
operational_insights.summary: An increase in office supply expenses was noted in Q1, potentially inflated due to overlapping vendor services.
operational_insights.recommended_action: Review vendor contracts and renegotiate terms.
operational_insights.explanation: Comparison against real-time data suggests discrepancies in cost allocation, potentially affecting operational budgets.

operational_insights.title: Discrepancy in Supplier Payments
operational_insights.summary: Identified mismatches in Office Supplies Pro's invoice totals compared to payment records.
operational_insights.explanation: There is a notable difference between invoice amounts and what has been recorded in the system transactions.

hidden_ground_truth.actual_intent: Cross-validate real-time insights against the last quarter's transactional dataset.
expected_answer_facts: Office supply transactions show a discrepancy between recorded amounts and operational insights.
Office Supplies Pro and OfficeStation have overlapping payment records suggesting potential vendor misclassification.
